# Michael Dever & Associates

> Specialist English-language translation, content writing and editing for finance, investor relations and corporate communications in Switzerland.

Michael Dever & Associates is a Swiss professional-services firm founded in 2006 (celebrating its 20th anniversary in 2026). It helps organisations communicate clearly and confidently with investors, shareholders, analysts, clients and other stakeholders in English, drawing on more than two decades of experience in financial services. Offices are in Geneva and Charmey. The firm works in English, French and German, combining subject-matter expertise with publication-quality English.

## Services
- English-language translation (from French and German into English)
- Content writing
- Editing and revision

Typical assignments: annual and interim reports, earnings releases, investor presentations, sustainability disclosures, websites, speeches and other high-profile corporate communications.

## Approach to AI and confidentiality
The firm takes a pragmatic approach to artificial intelligence: AI-powered tools are used only where they add value, improve efficiency and do not place confidentiality at risk. Excellent communication is not generated automatically — every project benefits from human judgement, subject-matter expertise and an understanding of how sophisticated English-language audiences read and interpret information. Where confidentiality requirements or the nature of the assignment make AI inappropriate, the firm works entirely without it.

## Clients
Banks, insurers, non-financial companies, regulators, public bodies and professional services firms across Switzerland.
